response:
Yes we can check how long it took for udp packet to be sent to server like ping but only one direction

To do this we can use a udp sender and measure the time between sending the packet and receiving the response

We can use a timer to track the time taken

We can also use a socket to send the udp packet and receive the response

We can then calculate the time difference between sending and receiving the packet

This will give us the time it took for the udp packet to be sent to the server

We can also use a loop to send multiple packets and calculate the average time

This will give us a more accurate measurement of the time it took for the udp packet to be sent to the server
